title: eDM Marriott Email Tools - Development Progress
description: Internal tracker for build execution. Focused on major delivery items only.

iterationPolicy.note: Markets manage revisions until final approval.

phases.title: Pre-Step 0 - Platform Revamp and Admin Foundation
phases.description: Major implementation already completed and ready as baseline for next development.

items.title: Architecture migration completed (React + Express + Prisma)
items.details: Legacy structure moved to React frontend and Express API with Prisma data layer.

items.title: Admin shell and Marriott branding applied
items.details: TailAdmin-based shell integrated with Marriott brand assets, color theme, and responsive layout.

items.title: Auth, session, and role permission foundation completed
items.details: Login flow, protected routes, role matrix, and permission guards are in place.

items.title: Users management implemented with modal workflows
items.details: Create, edit, change role, reset password, and active status management implemented.

items.title: Archive migrated with full core behavior parity
items.details: Search-first filtering, year/area/market filtering, sync/reset controls, and month chips are active.

items.title: Preview flow moved into React route
items.details: Archive opens preview in-app with back/open/copy/device controls.

items.title: Broken preview handling hardened
items.details: Broken mirror/error pages now detected and shown as NO PREVIEW fallback.

items.title: Admin master modules scaffolded with database-backed CRUD
items.details: Template, Source Campaign Master, Areas, and Markets modules now available for configuration.

items.title: Builder template grouping aligned to Template 1-6
items.details: Fixed template group structure added for Template 1-6 with campaign-level template selection.

phases.title: Pre-Step 1 - Template Preparation
phases.description: Template preparation wave focused on archive parity and master-data quality.

items.title: Archive-to-master seeding pipeline implemented
items.details: Seed endpoint added to populate/update Areas, Markets, Additional Markets, and Source Campaign Master from deployed archive rows.

items.title: Execute seed run and validate master data quality
items.details: Run seed on environment and verify template/area/market/additional-market mapping quality before Step 1 handoff.

items.title: Markets admin split completed
items.details: Markets module now separated into two tables: Markets and Additional Markets, each with dedicated create/edit workflow.

items.title: Source Campaign Master moved to dedicated admin module
items.details: Source Campaign management is now separated from Template page and handled in Admin - Source Campaigns.

items.title: Additional Markets selection upgraded to multi-select
items.details: Source Campaign forms now use multi-select for Additional Markets instead of free-text comma input.

items.title: Template preview modal enabled (view-only)
items.details: Template page now supports thumbnail preview with popup viewer and stored-HTML preview mode in admin panel.

items.title: Archive preview reliability hardening
items.details: Broken-link/error-page detection is enforced so invalid preview URLs always fall back to NO PREVIEW.

items.title: Archive UX parity polish (filters + in-panel preview flow)
items.details: Archive filter/preview UX parity completed, including Preview/No Preview filter and sync loading indicator in-panel.

phases.title: Main Workflow Steps (Markets + System + Mediatropy)
phases.description: Execution flow for campaign build and proof approval lifecycle (Step 0 to Step 6), with build/output/done criteria per step.

items.title: Step 0 - Select source campaign/template from archive
items.details: Use Archive + Source Campaign Master as the preparation baseline before Markets start Step 1.

subItems.title: Source Campaign Master module available in Admin
Archive-to-master seeding endpoint implemented
Seed execution and source campaign quality validation on active environment
Market-facing source selection readiness sign-off

items.title: Step 1 - Markets select template and create campaign draft (Marriott)
items.details: Build: campaign workspace + template picker from approved set (Template 1-6) + pre-confirm preview. Output: campaign draft created from selected template. Done when: market can create a valid campaign draft without manual DB edits.

subItems.title: Template picker wired to approved templates (Template 1-6)
Campaign selector/manager wired from Campaign module
Pre-confirm preview flow before draft creation
Create campaign draft action (no manual DB edits)

items.title: Step 2 - Markets build content and images in drag-drop template builder
items.details: Build: structured JSON-based drag-drop editor with locked header/footer, personalization, email-safe rendering, versioning, and QA checks. Output: versioned draft HTML is generated safely and previewable on desktop/mobile before proof send. Done when: market can build/edit/reorder blocks and save validated drafts without manual HTML edits.

subItems.title: Define strict template JSON model (blocks/layout/props/tokens) and persist in DB
Lock header/footer blocks (cannot move/delete)
Implement dnd-kit drag-drop canvas foundation
Build left panel block library
Build center canvas drop zones + block reorder/snap
Build right panel block settings (text/image/link/style)
Add undo/redo history stack
Add autosave draft snapshots
Implement JSON -> email-safe HTML renderer
Enforce Outlook-safe table structure rules
Sanitize pasted/imported HTML before render
Desktop/Mobile preview modes before proof send
Asset workflow: upload/replace/crop + alt text
Token picker for Member Name / Bonvoy Tier / Points Balance
Token validation to block broken personalization
Draft versioning: compare/restore
Allow proof send from selected version and preserve final-lock readiness
QA guardrails: missing links/images/alt + block-level validation
Campaign-scoped workflow foundation (Campaign list + Manage entry + builder context by campaignId)
Campaign workspace tabs scaffolded (Builder, Proof, Approval, Versions, History)
Campaign template binding hardened (manage flow now respects selected campaign template)
Step 2 workspace UX cleanup (metadata strip + optional quick populate panel)
Step 2 market UAT sign-off and final polish pass
Builder UX Phase A polish (sticky actions, cleaner flow, advanced tools collapsed)
Builder UX Phase B polish (section controls, labeled block settings, visible preview device tabs)
Media module (WordPress-like) for Step 2 assets using server storage first
Add Media menu/page with gallery grid, search/filter, and detail drawer
Implement media APIs and DB persistence (server storage, cloud-ready abstraction later)
Enable multi-upload, metadata edit (name/alt), single delete and bulk delete
Builder image field integration with Media library picker
Add 'Choose from Media' and 'Upload new' actions in Step 2 image forms
Reuse one media modal across click-to-edit and block settings image workflows
Keep direct URL input as fallback for external asset links

items.title: Step 3 - Markets send proofs to inbox (up to 10 iterations)
items.details: Build: send-proof action, recipients, revision note, resend flow, and iteration counter/history (up to 10). Output: proof rounds tracked with timestamps. Done when: full revision loop runs without losing version history.

subItems.title: Proof recipient list and validation
Send proof action with iteration increment
Revision note and resend flow
Iteration cap guard (max 10 rounds)
Proof history log with timestamps and status

items.title: Step 4 - Markets mark proof as final
items.details: Build: Mark as Final action with lock behavior and final snapshot. Output: status moves to final-approved with full timeline. Done when: final version is immutable and auditable.

subItems.title: Mark-as-final action in workflow
Final snapshot stored for approved proof
Lock editing after final approval
Audit timeline updated with finalization event

items.title: Step 5 - System sends final approval notification to Mediatropy
items.details: Build: automatic notification trigger after Step 4, email template, retry and delivery logs. Output: Mediatropy receives final-ready notification with campaign context. Done when: send is reliable and logged.

subItems.title: Final-approval trigger fired from Step 4 event
Notification email template and payload mapping
Delivery retry mechanism
Notification delivery log and status visibility

items.title: Step 6 - Mediatropy inputs final assets into Adobe Web UI
items.details: Build: final handoff checklist and status update flow for Adobe Web UI entry. Output: campaign marked handoff completed. Done when: MT confirms Adobe input completion and campaign is closed.

subItems.title: Final handoff checklist prepared from approved proof
Adobe Web UI submission metadata captured
Handoff completion confirmation by Mediatropy
Campaign closed with final status and timestamp
